Headline: #4 Cottage Grove and #X4 Cottage Grove Express Temporary Northbound Reroute near Cottage Grove/58th
ShortDescription: Northbound 4 Cottage Grove and X4 Cottage Grove Express buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near Cottage Grove/58th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #4 Cottage Grove and #X4 Cottage Grove Express buses are temporarily rerouted via Cottage Grove, Midway Plaisance, Payne Drive, 55th, Cottage Grove and over normal route, due to street blockage near Cottage Grove/58th.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
